text:
Sugestions:

- Switch to DISTVERSION instead of PORTVERSION
  https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#makefile-versions

- Define LICENSE_FILE
  https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#licenses-license

- Remove unneeded '+' from CMAKE_{ON,OFF}

Thanks
